# mrsellers.homes — Tyler Sellers, Bergen County NJ real estate
> Tyler Sellers is a Bergen County, NJ realtor (RE/MAX Signature Homes) who
> reads the economy — local market reports, NJ transaction mechanics, and
> econ-to-local-housing analysis.

## Market data
- [Town market reports](https://mrsellers.homes/#towns): monthly sold-data
  reports for all 70 Bergen County towns, refreshed from NJMLS.

## Guides
- [Blog — The Sellers' Take](https://mrsellers.homes/blog/): NJ selling
  mechanics, closing costs, macro-to-Bergen analysis.
- [Glossary](https://mrsellers.homes/glossary/): NJ real estate terms.

## Contact
- [About Tyler](https://mrsellers.homes/about.html) · tyler@mrsellers.homes · +1-201-308-0525
